Probably it fits better with semantics-measurement's candidate extraction: using argument mining to extract candidate claims and premises from the raw data that the reader provides. But the semantics-measurement module already has a projector and candidate extraction; it could be enhanced with argument mining techniques to identify argument components as candidates. That seems concrete and supported by the source: the survey describes how to identify argument components. So I'll pick "semantics-measurement".
